since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.98%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.84% · Gold +1.16% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.98%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.98%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +8.39%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +8.39%, LRCX +7.16%, TER +6.86%, KLAC +6.70%, MU +6.50%. Laggards: IBM -5.10%, NOW -4.60%, CRM -4.55%, WDAY -4.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.15% at $151.49
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
